'''Po Reggis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] agricultural technician in the city of [[Griann]] on [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]] and the husband of [[Jiki Reggis]] who had lived on Teyr for twenty-eight years when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]] arrived searching for the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].
